title: micropholis retusa
intro: Micropholis retusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the Burseraceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which provide various health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive system support. Micropholis retusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
